author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit 07a3dd1e (src/prompt.rs). Extracted 12288 -> PREFIX_CAPACITY_BYTES = 12 * 1024 and 4096 -> SUFFIX_CAPACITY_BYTES = 4 * 1024 with doc comments explaining the empirical derivation (prefix ~10 KiB across shipped presets, suffix ~2-3 KiB; aligns with slab/page boundaries to avoid realloc churn).
